programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: SONIC X Party Hardly
programme.desc: When Mr. Stewart drops by for a surprise visit, Chris and Chuck are barely able to keep Sonic and Friends' stay a secret and after Chris' uncle arrives, things get messier. Everyone, including Ella and Mr. Tanaka, are going to find out!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Meet the Gamers
programme.desc: Host Frankie view gets to know the Kidaverse Roblox Rumble gamers. Get to know their awesome personalities and strategies for the competition.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble KC Raceway
programme.desc: Join the gamers in their first challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers race to victory and earn their first round of points

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Kong for a Day
programme.desc: When King K. Rool and his cronies framed Donkey Kong for wrongdoing with his friends, it works even better than they expected Cranky banishes Donkey Kong to the White Mountains and Diddy replaces him to become the future ruler.

programme.title: SONIC X Satelite Swindle
programme.desc: After Eggman discovers that he is being watched by the military he sends E-90 to swallow the satellite, but this disrupts everyone's TVs! So Chuck and Tails decide to upgrade the Tornado into X-Tornado, allowing Sonic to enter high altitude in order to destroy E-90.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Yeti Set Go
programme.desc: Things get chilly as the gamers snowball into their second challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the kids battle the yetis to make it to the top of the icy mountain.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Fate of the Kidaverse
programme.desc: The gamers meet in the Kidaverse arcade in a test of fate. Host Frankie Vu watches as the kids select their pinball and add to their total score.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Raiders of the Lost Banana
programme.desc: Donkey Kong finds a golden banana inside Inka Dinka Doo's temple and gives it to Candy, but the banana contains a curse that causes havoc for whosoever keeps it and brings bad luck to the island.

programme.title: SONIC X The Last Resort
programme.desc: After Chris, Amy, Cream and Cheese arrive at a resort, Eggman appears and tries to take over with his E-39 but Sonic arrives and tries to stop him. However Sonic is unable to swim, and the robot tries to drag him into the ocean!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Leaping Lava
programme.desc: Things heat up in the fourth challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches the kids leap over the dangerous lava pits for a chance to become the ultimate gamer.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Zap Attack
programme.desc: The competition zaps into the 5th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers test their memory in this electrifying memory puzzle.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country From Zero to Hero
programme.desc: After Cranky's exam, Bluster believes he is going to die soon, so he tries to act nicely in order to be remembered well.

programme.title: SONIC X Unfair Ball
programme.desc: It's Team Sonic vs Team Eggman in a game of baseball for a Chaos Emerald! Team Sonic falls behind at first but then wins with a Sonic super-play, only to have Eggman to cheat and try to steal the Emerald regardless!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Jungle Jump
programme.desc: Welcome to the jungle and the 6th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers take on cranky crabs and hungry sharks as they make their way through this tropical obstacle course.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Garden Gauntlet
programme.desc: The competition grows and the gamers meet their 7th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players get lost in this hectic hedge maze.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Donkey Kong, Diddy and Funky find a map and soon, everyone wants to get the implied treasure. They all go on a treasure hunt and fight to get it.

programme.title: SONIC X Party Hardly
programme.desc: When Mr. Stewart drops by for a surprise visit, Chris and Chuck are barely able to keep Sonic and Friends' stay a secret and after Chris' uncle arrives, things get messier. Everyone, including Ella and Mr. Tanaka, are going to find out!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: The Pokémon Center is full, so our heroes help treat Pokémon at a hospital.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: James confronts his past upon returning to his family's mansion.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes encounter a boy who works with his Farfetch'd to steal Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A new Pokémon is about to hatch, and almost everyone wants to be its Trainer.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: During a battle, the bulb on Bulbasaur's back begins to glow—is it evolving?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The K-9 Capers
programme.desc: Pikachu joins a training class for Growlithe that work with the police.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends meet Todd, a photographer who wants to get a picture of Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and Team Rocket attempt a tough test to gain entry to the Pokémon League.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes encounter Butch and Cassidy of Team Rocket—Jessie and James's rivals.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Misty and Jessie compete to become queen of the Princess Festival.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: It's Kids Day, and Ash and friends help some schoolchildren celebrate.

programme.title: Pokémon

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash has to rely on his misbehaving Charizard for his Gym battle against Blaine

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends help a group of wild Squirtle, Wartortle, and Blastoise.

programme.title: 30 Minutes Or Less
programme.desc: The tale of three slacker friends and the adventures that ensure after one of them inadvertently robs a bank armed only with a large salami.

programme.title: No Census, No Feeling
programme.desc: The Stooges get jobs as census takers and wind up in a fancy mansion looking for people to survey. Moe and Larry are recruited to join a bridge game, while Curly adds Alum to the lemonade. The resulting concoction is consumed by everyone, resulting in puckered lips and shrunken clothes. The boys next try to take the census at a football stadium. They disguise themselves as players and wind up in the middle of the game. Curly runs off with the ball and all the other players in pursuit.

programme.title: Drinking Buddies
programme.desc: Luke and Kate are co-workers at a Chicago brewery, where they spend their days drinking and flirting. They're perfect for each other, except that they're both in relationships.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: The story of a Playboy Bunny who teaches an awkward sorority about the opposite sex - only to learn that what boys really like is what's on the inside.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: It was a stroke of genius, but now the perfect crime is turning into a perfect disaster.

programme.title: Smother
programme.desc: After being fired from his job, an everyday guy faces pressure from his wife about having a baby, while having to deal with his suffocating mother, who has decided to move in with the couple.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: A struggling songwriter named Dave Seville finds success when he comes across a trio of singing chipmunks: mischievous leader Alvin, brainy Simon, and chubby, impressionable Theodore.

programme.title: Adventure Mouse
programme.desc: Dreaming of adventure, city mouse Gamba joins a crew of Ship Mice ready to set sail - just as young Chuta bursts in, pleading for help. Stowing away on a boat, the gang heads for Dream Island to defend Chuta's family of mice against Noroi the White Weasel and his wicked weasel clan.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.title: Pets 2
programme.desc: Best buddies, Bella the laid-back cat, Bagel the goofy dog, and Alvin the opinionated parrot are hanging out on their cherished couch watching the best show on TV, Pets! Bella is particularly excited because today's episode of Pets is all about the coolest and most mysterious pet around: the cat!

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Manager Colleen's patience is tested to the limit by a rowdy group of BMX bikers, a boy takes his first unaccompanied flight, and a stressed mum and her two kids miss their flight in Chicago. S1Ep5

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Supervisor Mike Carr turns detective as he tries to solve the mystery of a missing ticket, and a passenger travels to LA to fulfil her lifelong dream to be a contestant on The Price is Right. S1Ep6

programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: The Quick And The Dead
programme.desc: (1963) War drama starring Victor French and Majel Barrett. With the aid of local partisans, a group of American soldiers try to make it through enemy-occupied Italy to safety.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: (1947) Western with the legendary John Wayne. A wounded gunslinger is taken in by a Quaker girl, who inspires him to give up his old ways - until his past catches up with him and puts her in danger.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Academy Award® winner Russell Crowe stars as Noah, a man chosen by God for a great task before an apocalyptic flood destroys the world.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by the innocence of those who live there, two young people become entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Iron Fury
programme.desc: In 1944, a young lieutenant leads a courageous group of Russian soldiers in a German POW camp, plotting a daring escape from captivity in a half-dest

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Honey Games
programme.desc: Maya is a determined little bee, but sometimes her determination can get her into sticky situations. When Maya accidentally embarrasses the Empress of Buzztropolis, she is forced to venture beyond her colony and team up with a group of mis-fit bugs in a bid to win The Honey Games and save her life.

programme.title: An Elephant's Journey
programme.desc: An Elephant's Journey' is a fun-filled and moving family adventure about a circus elephant and the importance of family and friendship. Starring Disney Channel favourite Jenna Ortega and Hollywood's David Arquette and Tom Arnold, fans of 'Dumbo' will love this film. Flora is a circus elephant who can no longer perform her tricks. Left out and alone, the circus owner's 14-year old daughter, Dawn, sneaks Flora from the circus after she finds the perfect place for retirement: an elephant sanctuary 480 km away. All that stands between them and the safety of the elephant preserve is hundreds of kilometres of woods, one raging river, two elephant hunters and the fear of not making it.

programme.title: Bernie the Dolphin
programme.desc: A heart-warming, wholesome family adventure about a brother and sister who befriend badly sunburned dolphin Bernie, who has recently been separated from his family. When Bernie goes missing and the kids go looking for him, they discover a real-estate development plan that threatens the baby sea turtles on their favourite beach. Can the brave duo stop the developers while racing to reunite Bernie with his loved ones?

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: A heart-warming story of family and friendship starring Academy Award Nominee Toni Collette and Ioan Gruffudd.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace becomes a princess when a summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: Beth Raymer leaves her dancing job at a Florida strip club to become a Las Vegas cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Chef
programme.desc: A head chef quits his restaurant job and buys a food truck in an effort to reclaim his creative promise.

programme.title: She's Funny That Way
programme.desc: On the set of a playwright's new project, a love triangle forms between his wife, her ex-lover, and an actress

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: Beth Raymer leaves her dancing job at a Florida strip club to become a Las Vegas cocktail waitress.

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins stars as Burt Munro, a man who never let the dreams of youth fade. After a lifetime of perfecting his classic Indian motorcycle, Burt set off from the bottom of the world to test his bike at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah. With all the odds against him, he set a new speed record and captured the spirit of his times. Burt Munro's 1967 world record remains unbroken and his legend lives on today.

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history. Based on the novel by the author of War Horse, Waiting for Anya follows the story of Jo Lalande, a thirteen-year-old shepherd living in the mountain village of Lescun. Though Europe may be ravaged by the horrors of World War II, Jo's world in the French Pyrenees has remained remarkably untouched. That is, until a ferocious encounter with a bear introduces Jo to the mysterious Benjamin, a Jewish refugee who is desperately awaiting the arrival of his missing daughter, Anya, before making his escape across the border. Making friends with Benjamin and his mother-in-law Horcada, an isolated widow who lives in the nearby mountains, Jo becomes aware of a very dangerous secret - the family are involved in smuggling Jewish children over the mountains to the safety of Spain. In a heroic act of defiance, Jo promises to assist Benjamin in his endeavours...but soon becomes embroiled in a perilous conspiracy when German troops make their descent upon the village. Filmed in the village of Lescun and the surrounding Aspe Valley, France in which the true to life story also originated, the film boasts an all-stellar cast including Noah Schnapp (Stranger Things), Academy Award Winner Anjelica Huston (Ever After, The Addams Family), Jean Reno (Leon, The Big Blue, Ronin), Frederick Schmidt (Mission: Impossible - Fallout), Thomas Kretschmann (The Pianist, Central Intelligence) and Nicholas Rowe (Riviera, Lock Stock and Two Smoking Barrels).

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: Bernie
programme.desc: In small-town Texas, an affable mortician strikes up a friendship with a wealthy widow, though when she starts to become controlling, he goes to great lengths to separate himself from her grasp.

programme.title: The Last Victim
programme.desc: A group of modern-day outlaws and their?terrifying?leader are pursued by a local sheriff, played by Ron Perlman (Hellboy), after committing a horrific crime in a desolate southwest town. When a professor and her husband cross paths with the criminals,?everyone is?drawn into a spiral of violence and retribution?where morality becomes ambiguous, and survival is the only option.

programme.title: Puppy Time
programme.desc: Get ready to fall in deep, deep puppy love as we follow a litter of adorable puppies as they play, nap, tumble, eat and play some more. Featuring the world's cutest and most loved and treasured breeds including Pugs, Labradors, Dachshunds and Pekingese - these furry pups will have you laughing, crying, swooning and barking for more as we watch them discover their new world. Pawsitively pawesome!

programme.title: Salt Beef and Rye
programme.desc: This vibrant documentary is inspired by the colourful characters who frequent the world famous Brick Lane. London's reputation as the cultural hub of the world can be attributed in part to its deep-rooted history and diverse communities. Salt Beef & Rye takes audiences on a tour through one of the city's most influential streets.

programme.title: Lez Bomb
programme.desc: Lez Bomb is a hilarious and sweet “coming out” comedy in the vein of Meet the Parents from Bobby Farrelly, producer of There's Something about Mary. Lauren, (Writer-Director Jenna Laurenzo) comes home with life changing news. As it turns out, there is no good time to drop the Lez Bomb.

programme.title: Standing Up Falling Down
programme.desc: After four years of chasing his stand-up comedy dream in Los Angeles, 34-year old Scott Rollins has crashed and burned. On a night out, Scott strikes up an unlikely friendship with an eccentric dermatologist, Marty. As their relationship evolves, they realise they need to find the strength to start confronting their long-simmering regrets.

programme.title: Two For The Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer prepares for the biggest race of his life all whilst falling for a local ski instructor. Starring Trevor Donovan (2021)

programme.title: Picture Perfect Romance
programme.desc: When a childhood friend insists her to be the photographer for her wedding, Zoey must rediscover her passion for wedding photography. Starring Celeste Desjardins (2022)

programme.title: Written in The Stars
programme.desc: (2021) Romance with Kimberley Crossman. A journalist teams up with an astrology guru to write about a local meteor shower festival - but will love also be written in the stars?

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: (2019) Rom-com starring Maggie Lawson. When her small bookstore is under threat of closure from greedy developers, Jamie must pull out all the stops to ensure its next chapter.

programme.title: Love Off the Page
programme.desc: (2022) Rom-com starring Malone Thomas. A hopeless romantic buys a book from a mysterious store, only to find its stories unfolding in real life. Will it depict her own love story?

programme.title: Rules Don't Apply
programme.desc: An aspiring young actress and her ambitious young driver struggle hopefully with the absurd eccentricities of the wildly unpredictable billionaire Howard Hughes, for whom they work.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: When Seattle interior designer Lily Summers returns to her hometown to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast, she meets Marcus, the handsome seaplane pilot whose life's work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery, all while juggling a blossoming romance with her client's brother.

programme.title: A Taste of Love
programme.desc: A struggling TV chef returns home to find that her family's restaurant is for sale, not able to compete with contemporary cuisine. Trying to save it, she reconnects with her childhood sweetheart and finds the inspiration she was seeking.

programme.title: Benny & Joon
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic drama about two misfits who come together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.title: Aloha
programme.desc: A celebrated military contractor returns to the site of his greatest career triumphs and re-connects with a long-ago love while unexpectedly falling for the hard-charging Air Force watchdog assigned to him.

programme.title: Elsa And Fred
programme.desc: A withdrawn senior experiences life in new ways when he begins spending time with the free-spirited woman who lives across the hall. Starring: Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer, Marcia Gay Harden

programme.title: A Rainy Day In New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris.

programme.title: My Perfect Romance
programme.desc: Robinson Tech is launching a new dating service that they ensure will find your Perfect Match. But when its's CEO and tech developer are challenged on Live TV to test the service themselves, the algorithm shows some interesting results.

programme.title: Calling For Love
programme.desc: Podcaster Sam Sanders is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. Even though Love is the last thing on her mind, Samantha falls for charming Jake who calls in with a problem. Will Samantha follow her heart this time?

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Ruling of the Heart
programme.desc: Judge Morgan has become known for his no-nonsense toughness in court. He rules fast and he rules hard, barely noticing the person on the other end of his decisions. When he gets stuck in a cafe during a snowstorm, he is surprised to discover two of the other customers stranded with him happen to be people recently in his court, with verdicts handed down that have made him very unpopular. As the night unfolds in the small cafe, unexpected truth emerges from both sides that changes everything.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: Post-divorce, April loves wealthy Jacob, who hides a secret.

programme.title: The Perfect Girlfriend
programme.desc: Brandon takes a promotion and leaves his girlfriend Jensyn of five months in NYC.

programme.title: The Perfect Assistant
programme.desc: Rachel, Paul's perfect assistant, is secretly in love with him, a married man.

programme.title: Michelle/Troy and Josh
programme.desc: Three masked gunmen burst into Michelle's home.

programme.title: The Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: Lindsay's dream wedding canceled due to wild bachelorette party with Catherine.

programme.title: Lethal Beauty
programme.desc: A masseuse pays the price for being a good Samaritan when the young woman she helps turns out to be a killer.

programme.title: The Psycho She Met Online
programme.desc: While her husband heals from a car crash, Karen bonds with their new renter—until another houseguest vanishes.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: The time change and a case of mistaken identity result in a wonderful blind date for Trish and Parker, but is it enough to keep them together?

programme.title: Blueprint to the Heart
programme.desc: A TV host must choose between chasing ratings or following her heart when she falls for a handsome guest.

programme.title: Mackenzie's Raiders EP29-32
programme.desc: Colonel Mackenzie, commander of the 4th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Clark near Brackettville in Kinney County in southwest Texas during the 1870s, receives secret orders from President Ulysses S. Grant and Secretary of War William W. Belknap to stop bandits from crossing the Rio Grande into the United States, or from returning to Mexico.

programme.title: Django the Last Killer
programme.desc: Ramon's parents are killed by men of landowner John Barrett. While trying to get revenge, Ramon is wounded but has saved the life of Rezza, an old disillusioned killer.

programme.title: Santa Fe Passage
programme.desc: A disgraced Indian scout and his partner are hired to escort a wagonload of guns through Indian territory.

programme.title: Ride in the Whirlwind
programme.desc: Three cowboys, mistaken for members of an outlaw gang, are relentlessly pursued by a posse.

programme.title: Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: Two sailors - Puncher, ex-lightweight boxing champion of the Navy and a simple sort of chap and Knocker, the 'bright' boy of the ship - go ashore when HMS Gillingham puts into Naples.

programme.title: Floodtide
programme.desc: The son of a Scottish farmer dreams of life in the city.

programme.title: Madonna of the Seven Moons
programme.desc: After being attacked, Madalena develops a dual personality - she is a wealthy and glamorous wife and mother, until she changes and runs away to be with her gypsy lover. When her daughter decides to search for her mother, her two worlds collide.

programme.title: Hamlet

programme.title: Evil Empire: Friday the 13th Chapter 2
programme.desc: At the same time, in a hospital in Pyongyang, North Korea, a female doctor discovers a phenomenon where the cells of the deceased are being revived. However, she is forced to flee to South Korea due to the authorities' pursuit. A series of serial killings known as the "Suicide Syndrome" continue to occur simultaneously, and the whereabouts of both Phillip and Cheong-ha, who were investigating the case, remain mysterious. Meanwhile, the young police officer Jae-hyeok, who provided crucial clues to Cheong-ha in her time of crisis, finds himself relentlessly pursued by killers dispatched from Japan and the United States. Despite relying on information from an anonymous woman who calls him unilaterally, Jae-hyeok unwittingly gets drawn closer to the center of the case as the situation progresses. GenreWhat is the key to the case that Jae-hyeok holds? Why are ruthless killers from the United States pursuing him? Why is the foreign police from Japan investigating the "Suicide Syndrome" in Korea? And why is North Korea trying to conceal the truth about a secret project from the Japanese military?

programme.title: Cadaver
programme.desc: The anatomy class is not finished yet!

programme.title: YMCA Baseball Team
programme.desc: Korea's first baseball team wins games and the hearts and hopes of her people.

programme.title: Last Film
programme.desc: At a provincial university's film and theater department, Park Sang-min, who teaches film, is also a film director. In the midst of this crisis, loan shark Man-bok approaches Sang-min and proposes a deal: if Sang-min makes a film about Man-bok's life, Man-bok will help him pay off his debt. Sang-min accepts the offer, and as they work Afterward, "Sang-min" embarks on a journey with "Man-bok," experiencing events that blur the lines between dream and reality. The ultimate film they always wanted to create becomes their last reel. Sang-min accumulated a significant amount of debt while making movies, eventually coming under threat from loan sharks.

programme.title: Open City
programme.desc: A seductive thief and a relentless cop clash in a tense game of love and duty in a dangerous criminal world.

programme.title: Pain
programme.desc: A love story between a man who cannot sense anything and a woman with hemophilia.

programme.title: My Little Bride
programme.desc: Bo-eun must marry Sang-min due to a family promise. Things get complicated when he becomes her school teacher.

programme.title: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: An old man's death puts his housekeeper on trial. Soon-ho's only witness is Ji-woo, a teen with Asperger's.

programme.title: Last Signal
programme.desc: When a meteor shower unexpectedly ravages her hometown, Lera's father finds ingenious ways to communicate with her from aboard the space station Mira.

programme.title: Above the Shadows
programme.desc: 'Above the Shadows' is a magic realism tale about a young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible and must find her way back into the world.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: Tuck, Munch and Alex are a trio of inseparable friends who long for adventure. One day the boys find a cryptic signal on their phones and convinced that it is part of something bigger they set out on a quest to find the source.

programme.title: Edge of War
programme.desc: A series of incidents around the world lead to greater conflict, placing the superpowers at one another's throats. Armies march, bombs rain down, soldiers storm the beaches. One family is caught up in the conflict, can they survive as total war is declared and nuclear weapons are unleashed?

programme.title: Cops Uncut

programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.
